TERMS.HEADING: Terms of Service
TERMS.META_DESCRIPTION: Read the terms and conditions for using the CashManager platform.
TERMS.INTRO: Please read these Terms of Service ("Terms", "Terms of Service") carefully before using our website and services. Your access to and use of the service is conditioned on your acceptance of and compliance with these Terms.
TERMS.SECTION_1_TEXT: By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you may not access the service. These Terms apply to all visitors, users and others who access or use the service.
TERMS.SECTION_2_1_TEXT: To use certain features of our services, you must register for an account. By registering, you agree to:
TERMS.SECTION_2_1_ITEM_1: Provide accurate, current and complete information during the registration process
TERMS.SECTION_2_1_ITEM_2: Maintain and promptly update your account information to keep it accurate and current
TERMS.SECTION_2_1_ITEM_3: Maintain the security of your password and accept all risks of unauthorized access
TERMS.SECTION_2_1_ITEM_4: Notify us immediately if you discover or suspect any security breach related to your account
TERMS.SECTION_2_2_TEXT: You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account. You may not share your account credentials with third parties. If you authorize a third party to manage your account on your behalf, you do so at your own risk.
TERMS.SECTION_3_TEXT: As a user of our service, you agree to:
TERMS.SECTION_3_ITEM_1: Use the services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms
TERMS.SECTION_3_ITEM_2: Not use the services in any way that violates any applicable local, state, national or international law
TERMS.SECTION_3_ITEM_3: Not impersonate any person or entity, or falsely state or otherwise misrepresent your affiliation with a person or entity
TERMS.SECTION_3_ITEM_4: Not interfere with or disrupt the services or servers or networks connected to the services
TERMS.SECTION_3_ITEM_5: Not attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the services or any other systems or networks
TERMS.SECTION_4_TEXT: You agree not to engage in any of the following prohibited activities:
TERMS.SECTION_4_ITEM_1: Copy, distribute or disclose any part of the services in any medium
TERMS.SECTION_4_ITEM_2: Use any automated system, including robots, spiders or scrapers, to access the services
TERMS.SECTION_4_ITEM_3: Transmit spam, chain letters or other unsolicited communications
TERMS.SECTION_4_ITEM_4: Attempt to interfere with, compromise or disrupt the integrity or security of the services
TERMS.SECTION_4_ITEM_5: Collect or harvest any personally identifiable information from the services
TERMS.SECTION_4_ITEM_6: Use the services for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
TERMS.SECTION_4_ITEM_7: Engage in any conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone’s use of the services
TERMS.SECTION_4_ITEM_8: Introduce any viruses, malware or other harmful code
TERMS.SECTION_5_1_TEXT: The services and their original content, features and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of the company and its licensors. The services are protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws of the United States and foreign countries.
TERMS.SECTION_5_2_TEXT: You retain ownership of any content you submit, post or display on or through the services. By submitting content, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, copy, modify and display that content in connection with providing the services.
TERMS.SECTION_5_3_TEXT: If you provide us with any feedback, suggestions or ideas relating to the services, you grant us the right to use such feedback without restriction and without compensation to you.
TERMS.SECTION_6_TEXT: If you purchase any paid features or subscriptions:
TERMS.SECTION_6_ITEM_1: You agree to pay all fees associated with your account
TERMS.SECTION_6_ITEM_2: Fees are non-refundable except as required by law or as expressly stated in these Terms
TERMS.SECTION_6_ITEM_3: We may change our fees with thirty (30) days’ prior notice
TERMS.SECTION_6_ITEM_4: You are responsible for all applicable taxes
TERMS.SECTION_6_ITEM_5: Non-payment may result in suspension or termination of your account
TERMS.SECTION_7_1_TEXT: THE SERVICES ARE PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE", WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, NON-INFRINGEMENT OR COURSE OF PERFORMANCE.
TERMS.SECTION_7_2_TEXT: Our services are for informational and organizational purposes only. Nothing on our platform constitutes professional financial, legal or tax advice. You should consult qualified professionals before making any financial decisions.
TERMS.SECTION_7_3_TEXT: While we strive to provide accurate information, we do not guarantee that the information, calculations or analyses provided through our services are accurate, complete or current.
TERMS.SECTION_8_TEXT: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, IN NO EVENT SHALL THE COMPANY, ITS AFFILIATES, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES OR AGENTS BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, PUNITIVE, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL OR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION DAMAGES FOR LOSS OF PROFITS, GOODWILL, USE, DATA OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES, ARISING OUT OF OR RELATING TO THE USE OR INABILITY TO USE THE SERVICES.
TERMS.SECTION_8_TEXT_2: IN NO EVENT SHALL OUR TOTAL LIABILITY TO YOU FOR ALL DAMAGES, LOSSES OR CAUSES OF ACTION EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU HAVE PAID US IN THE LAST SIX (6) MONTHS, OR ONE HUNDRED DOLLARS ($100), WHICHEVER IS GREATER.
TERMS.SECTION_9_TEXT: You agree to defend, indemnify and hold harmless the company and its affiliates, licensors and service providers from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, judgments, awards, losses, costs, expenses or fees (including reasonable attorneys’ fees) arising out of or relating to your violation of these Terms or your use of the services.
TERMS.SECTION_10_1_TEXT: You may terminate your account at any time by following the instructions in your account settings or by contacting us. Upon termination, your right to use the services will cease immediately.
TERMS.SECTION_10_2_TEXT: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including without limitation breach of these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the services will cease immediately.
TERMS.SECTION_10_3_TEXT: All provisions of the Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including provisions of ownership, warranty disclaimers, indemnification and limitations of liability.
TERMS.SECTION_11_TEXT: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of [Your Jurisdiction], without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not be considered a waiver of those rights.
TERMS.SECTION_12_1_TEXT: Before filing a claim against us, you agree to attempt to resolve the dispute informally by contacting us. We will attempt to resolve the dispute informally by contacting you by email. If a dispute is not resolved within thirty (30) days of submission, you or we may commence formal proceedings.
TERMS.SECTION_12_2_TEXT: Any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms or the services shall be finally settled by binding arbitration. The arbitration shall be conducted in [Your Location] in accordance with the rules of [Arbitration Organization]. The arbitrator’s decision shall be final and binding.
TERMS.SECTION_12_3_TEXT: You agree that any arbitration or proceeding shall be limited to the dispute between us individually. You waive any right to participate in a class action lawsuit or class-wide arbitration.
TERMS.SECTION_13_TEXT: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time at our sole discretion. If a revision is material, we will provide at least thirty (30) days’ notice before any new terms take effect. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.
TERMS.SECTION_14_TEXT: If any provision of these Terms is held to be invalid or unenforceable by a court, the remaining provisions of these Terms will remain in effect. The invalid or unenforceable provision will be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it valid and enforceable.
TERMS.SECTION_15_TEXT: These Terms constitute the entire agreement between you and us regarding our services and supersede and replace any prior agreements we might have had between us regarding the services.
TERMS.SECTION_16_TEXT: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

PRIVACY.HEADING: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY.META_DESCRIPTION: Learn how Cash Manager collects, uses and protects your personal information.
PRIVACY.INTRO: This Privacy Policy describes how your personal information is collected, used and shared when you visit or use our services. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring you have a positive experience on our platform.
PRIVACY.SECTION_1_1_TEXT: We collect information you provide directly, including:
PRIVACY.SECTION_1_1_ITEM_1: Account Information: Name, email address, password and profile details when you create an account.
PRIVACY.SECTION_1_1_ITEM_2: Financial Data: Transaction records, account balances, debt information and payment history that you choose to enter or connect.
PRIVACY.SECTION_1_1_ITEM_3: Communications: Information you provide when contacting our support team or participating in surveys.
PRIVACY.SECTION_1_1_ITEM_4: Payment Information: Billing details and payment method information when you subscribe to premium services.
PRIVACY.SECTION_1_2_TEXT: When you access our services, we automatically collect:
PRIVACY.SECTION_1_2_ITEM_1: Device Information: Browser type, operating system, device identifiers and IP address.
PRIVACY.SECTION_1_2_ITEM_2: Usage Data: Pages viewed, features used, time spent on the platform and interaction patterns.
PRIVACY.SECTION_1_2_ITEM_3: Cookies and Similar Technologies: Information collected through cookies, web beacons and similar tracking technologies (see our Cookie Policy for details).
PRIVACY.SECTION_2_TEXT: We use the collected information for the following purposes:
PRIVACY.SECTION_2_ITEM_1: Provide, maintain and improve our services
PRIVACY.SECTION_2_ITEM_2: Process transactions and send related information
PRIVACY.SECTION_2_ITEM_3: Send technical notices, updates, security alerts and administrative messages
PRIVACY.SECTION_2_ITEM_4: Respond to your comments, questions and customer service requests
PRIVACY.SECTION_2_ITEM_5: Analyze usage patterns to improve user experience
PRIVACY.SECTION_2_ITEM_6: Detect, prevent and address technical issues and fraudulent activity
PRIVACY.SECTION_2_ITEM_7: Comply with legal obligations and protect our rights
PRIVACY.SECTION_3_TEXT: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information in the following circumstances:
PRIVACY.SECTION_3_ITEM_1: Service Providers: With third parties that perform services on our behalf, such as payment processing, data analysis and customer support.
PRIVACY.SECTION_3_ITEM_2: Business Transfers: In connection with a merger, acquisition or asset sale, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction.
PRIVACY.SECTION_3_ITEM_3: Legal Requirements: When required by law, subpoena or other legal process, or to protect our rights, privacy, safety or property.
PRIVACY.SECTION_3_ITEM_4: With Your Consent: When you have given explicit permission to share your information.
PRIVACY.SECTION_4_TEXT: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction. These measures include:
PRIVACY.SECTION_4_ITEM_1: Encryption of data in transit and at rest using industry-standard protocols
PRIVACY.SECTION_4_ITEM_2: Regular security assessments and penetration testing
PRIVACY.SECTION_4_ITEM_3: Access controls that limit employee access to personal data
PRIVACY.SECTION_4_ITEM_4: Secure data centers with physical security measures
PRIVACY.SECTION_5_TEXT: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law. When determining retention periods, we consider the nature of the information, potential risks and legal requirements.
PRIVACY.SECTION_6_1_TEXT: You have the right to request access to the personal information we hold about you and to receive a copy of your data in a structured, commonly used format.
PRIVACY.SECTION_6_2_TEXT: You can update, correct or request deletion of your personal information by accessing your account settings or contacting us directly.
PRIVACY.SECTION_6_3_TEXT: You can opt out of receiving promotional communications by following the unsubscribe instructions in those messages or updating your notification preferences.
PRIVACY.SECTION_6_4_TEXT: If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have additional rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), including:
PRIVACY.SECTION_6_4_ITEM_1: Right to object to processing of your personal data
PRIVACY.SECTION_6_4_ITEM_3: Right to withdraw consent at any time
PRIVACY.SECTION_6_4_ITEM_4: Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
PRIVACY.SECTION_6_5_TEXT: California residents have specific rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), including:
PRIVACY.SECTION_6_5_ITEM_1: Right to know what personal information is collected and how it is used
PRIVACY.SECTION_6_5_ITEM_3: Right to opt-out of the sale of personal information (note: we do not sell personal information)
PRIVACY.SECTION_6_5_ITEM_4: Right to non-discrimination for exercising privacy rights
PRIVACY.SECTION_7_TEXT: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to collect and store information about your interactions with our services. For detailed information about our use of cookies and how to manage your preferences, see our Cookie Policy.
PRIVACY.SECTION_8_TEXT: Our services may contain links to third-party websites or integrate with third-party services. This Privacy Policy does not apply to those third parties, and we encourage you to review their privacy policies before providing personal information.
PRIVACY.SECTION_9_TEXT: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your country of residence. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place to protect your information in accordance with this Privacy Policy and applicable data protection laws.
PRIVACY.SECTION_10_TEXT: Our services are not directed to individuals under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that a child has provided personal information, we will take steps to delete such information.
PRIVACY.SECTION_11_TEXT: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for other operational, legal or regulatory reasons. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
PRIVACY.SECTION_12_TEXT: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at:

COOKIES.HEADING: Cookie Policy
COOKIES.META_DESCRIPTION: Learn how Cash Manager uses cookies and similar tracking technologies.
COOKIES.INTRO: This Cookie Policy explains how we use cookies and similar tracking technologies when you visit our website or use our services. It explains what these technologies are, why we use them, and your rights to control our use of them.
COOKIES.SECTION_1_TEXT: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, provide a better user experience, and provide information to website owners.
COOKIES.SECTION_1_TEXT_2: Cookies can be "persistent" or "session" cookies. Persistent cookies remain on your device when you go offline, while session cookies are deleted as soon as you close your browser.
COOKIES.SECTION_2_TEXT: We use the following types of cookies in our services:
COOKIES.SECTION_2_1_TEXT: These cookies are strictly necessary for the operation of our website. They enable essential functionality such as security, network management, and account access. You cannot disable these cookies as the services would not function properly without them.
COOKIES.SECTION_2_2_TEXT: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve our services and user experience.
COOKIES.SECTION_2_3_TEXT: These cookies enable enhanced functionality and personalization, such as remembering your preferences and settings. They may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our pages.
COOKIES.SECTION_2_4_TEXT: These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show relevant ads on other sites. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
COOKIES.SECTION_3_TEXT: In addition to our own cookies, we may also use various third-party cookies to report usage statistics of the services and deliver advertisements on the services. These third parties may include:
COOKIES.SECTION_3_ITEM_1: Google Analytics: Web analytics service that tracks and reports website traffic
COOKIES.SECTION_3_ITEM_2: Vercel Analytics: Performance monitoring and analytics
COOKIES.SECTION_4_1_TEXT: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings preferences. However, limiting a website’s ability to set cookies may impact your overall user experience. Below are links to cookie management instructions for popular browsers:
COOKIES.SECTION_4_2_TEXT: When you first visit our site, you will see a cookie consent banner that allows you to accept or reject non-essential cookies. You can change your preferences at any time by clicking the "Cookie Settings" link in the footer of our site.
COOKIES.SECTION_4_3_TEXT: You can also disable certain third-party cookies using the following links:
COOKIES.SECTION_5_TEXT: In addition to cookies, we may use other similar technologies:
COOKIES.SECTION_5_ITEM_1: Web Beacons: Small graphic images (also known as "pixel tags") that may be included in our services and emails to measure engagement.
COOKIES.SECTION_5_ITEM_2: Local Storage: Technology that allows a website to store and retrieve data on a user’s device, similar to cookies but with greater capacity.
COOKIES.SECTION_5_ITEM_3: Session Storage: Similar to local storage, but the data is cleared when the browser session ends.
COOKIES.SECTION_6_TEXT: Some browsers have a "Do Not Track" feature that signals to websites that you do not want your online activity tracked. Our services currently do not respond to Do Not Track signals. However, you can manage your cookie preferences using the methods described above.
COOKIES.SECTION_7_TEXT: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in the cookies we use or for other operational, legal or regulatory reasons. Please review this Cookie Policy regularly to stay informed about our use of cookies and related technologies.
COOKIES.SECTION_7_TEXT_2: The date at the top of this Cookie Policy indicates when it was last updated.
COOKIES.SECTION_8_TEXT: If you have any questions about our use of cookies or other technologies, please contact us at:

LANDING.META_DESCRIPTION: Manage your finances efficiently with Cash Manager. Track your transactions and keep your finances organized.
LANDING.TAKE_FULL_CONTROL_FINANCIAL_LIFE: Take full control of your financial life.
LANDING.DASHBOARD_SECTION_TEXT: A powerful dashboard that puts all your financial data front and center with intuitive visualizations.
LANDING.MULTI_CURRENCY_TEXT: Manage accounts, goals, and debts in multiple currencies with automatic conversion and real-time exchange rate tracking.
LANDING.INSIGHTS_ANALYTICS_TEXT: Visual dashboards with income vs. expense breakdowns, balance trends, and performance analytics to help you make better financial decisions.
LANDING.SOCIAL_FINANCE_SECTION_TEXT: Financial management is better when shared. Invite friends, family, or partners to collaborate on common goals, track shared expenses, and hold each other accountable.
LANDING.CREATOR: Creator
LANDING.FRIENDSHIP_SYSTEM_TEXT: Add trusted contacts and manage your financial circle with a familiar, social-network-style friends system.
LANDING.PERMISSION_BASED_ACCESS_TEXT: Control exactly what each person can see or do. Grant view-only or full participant access per account, debt, or goal.
LANDING.SECURE_SHARING_TEXT: Share accounts, debts, goals, and more with end-to-end encrypted links. Your data never leaves your control.
LANDING.COLLABORATIVE_TRACKING_TEXT: Work together on shared expenses, joint debts, or family savings goals with real-time updates for everyone.
LANDING.FOOTER_TEXT: Take full control of your financial life with powerful tools to track, manage, and collaborate on your finances.
LANDING.ACCOUNTS_TRANSACTIONS_TEXT: Track multiple accounts and all related transactions in one place. Get a clear view of your cash flow across banks, savings, and credit cards.
LANDING.DEBT_MANAGEMENT_TEXT: Monitor your debts and payment history with detailed transaction tracking. Visualize your payoff progress and stay on schedule.
LANDING.FINANCIAL_GOALS_TEXT: Create savings goals and track your contributions with full visibility. Set milestones and watch your progress grow over time.
LANDING.SOCIAL_FINANCE_TEXT: Share accounts, debts, and goals with trusted friends or family using a permission-based friendship system.
LANDING.FEATURES_SECTION_TITLE: Everything You Need to Manage Your Finances.
LANDING.FEATURES_SECTION_TEXT: A comprehensive set of tools designed to give you total visibility and control over every aspect of your financial life.
LANDING.HOW_IT_WORKS_TITLE: Get Started in Three Simple Steps
LANDING.HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_ONE_TITLE: Create your accounts, goals, and debts
LANDING.HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_ONE_TEXT: Set up your financial accounts, define savings goals, and organize your debts. It all starts with a clear picture of your current situation.
LANDING.HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_TWO_TEXT: Record transactions, monitor debt payments, and watch your balances update in real time. Total visibility of every cent.
LANDING.HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_THREE_TEXT: Invite friends and family to share accounts or goals. Work together to pay off joint debts and celebrate financial wins.
LANDING.HERO_SECTION_TEXT: Track accounts, manage debts, and set goals. Collaborate with friends and family through secure, permission-based sharing.
LANDING.CTA_SECTION_TEXT: Join thousands of users who have already taken control of their financial life. Free to start, powerful enough to grow with you.

AUTH.SLOGAN: Cash Manager — The Best Financial Manager
